languages.text: Храм, найденный Вольным Торговцем в глубине корневой системы Заркова, стал тайным проклятием планеты. Псайкеры ссылались в его недра, чтобы привлекать Погонщиц и удерживать их внутри, закупоривая гробницу. Эта жертва считалась сакральной, а чудовища стали символом самой планеты и ее богатств.

The temple found by the Rogue Trader deep within Zarkov's root system became the planet's secret curse. Psykers were banished to its depths to lure the Drovers there and trap them inside, sealing off the tomb. This sacrifice was considered sacred, and the monsters became a symbol of the planet itself and its riches.
languages.original_text: Храм, найденный Вольным Торговцем в глубине корневой системы Заркова, стал тайным проклятием планеты. Псайкеры ссылались в его недра, чтобы привлекать Погонщиц и удерживать их внутри, закупоривая гробницу. Эта жертва считалась сакральной, а чудовища стали символом самой планеты и ее богатств.

This sacrifice was considered sacred, and the monsters became a symbol of the planet itself and its riches.

The temple found by the Rogue Trader deep within Zarkov's root system became the planet's secret curse. Psykers were banished to its depths to lure the Drovers there and trap them inside, sealing off the tomb. languages.text: ローグトレーダーがザルコフの根系の奥深くで発見した寺院は、この惑星の秘められた呪いとなった。サイカーたちはその深部へと追いやられ、ドローヴァーをそこへ誘い込んで閉じ込め、墳墓を封じるために用いられた。この犠牲は神聖なものとみなされ、かの怪物どもは惑星そのものと、その富の象徴となったのである。
languages.original_text: The temple found by the Rogue Trader deep within Zarkov's root system became the planet's secret curse. Psykers were banished to its depths to lure the Drovers there and trap them inside, sealing off the tomb. This sacrifice was considered sacred, and the monsters became a symbol of the planet itself and its riches.

traits.locale_text: ザルコフの根系深くに、ローグ・トレーダーによって発見された寺院が、この惑星の秘密の呪いとなった。数年に一度、ドルーバーを閉じ込める障壁を強化するために、サイカーの力を注入する必要があった。時間とともに、惑星に住むサイカーを障壁とドルーバーに捧げる儀式が聖なるものとなり、その怪物は惑星そのものとその富の象徴となった。
ローグトレーダーがザルコフの根系の奥深くで発見した寺院は、この惑星の秘められた呪いとなった。サイカーたちはその深部へと追いやられ、ドローヴァーをそこへ誘い込んで閉じ込め、墳墓を封じるために用いられた。この犠牲は神聖なものとみなされ、かの怪物どもは惑星そのものと、その富の象徴となったのである。

languages.text: 行商浪人在扎尔科夫根系深处发现的神庙，成了这颗行星的隐秘诅咒。灵能者被放逐到墓穴深处，用以引诱拒生花，并将它们困于其中，彻底封闭墓穴。这种牺牲被视为神圣之举，而这些怪物也成了行星本身及其财富的象征。
languages.original_text: The temple found by the Rogue Trader deep within Zarkov's root system became the planet's secret curse. Psykers were banished to its depths to lure the Drovers there and trap them inside, sealing off the tomb. This sacrifice was considered sacred, and the monsters became a symbol of the planet itself and its riches.

traits.locale_text: 行商浪人在扎尔科夫根系深处发现的神庙，成了这颗行星的隐秘诅咒。灵能者被放逐到墓穴深处，用以引诱拒生花，并将它们困于其中，彻底封闭墓穴。这种牺牲被视为神圣之举，而这些怪物也成了行星本身及其财富的象征。

languages.text: Le temple découvert par {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} au cœur du système radiculaire de Zarkov devint la malédiction secrète de la planète. Des psykers furent envoyés dans ses profondeurs pour y attirer les Chasseurs et les y enfermer en scellant le tombeau. Leur sacrifice fut considéré comme un acte sacré, et les monstres devinrent le symbole de la planète elle-même et de ses richesses.
languages.original_text: The temple found by the Rogue Trader deep within Zarkov's root system became the planet's secret curse. Psykers were banished to its depths to lure the Drovers there and trap them inside, sealing off the tomb. This sacrifice was considered sacred, and the monsters became a symbol of the planet itself and its riches.

traits.locale_text: Le temple découvert par {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} au cœur du système radiculaire de Zarkov devint la malédiction secrète de la planète. Des psykers furent envoyés dans ses profondeurs pour y attirer les Chasseurs et les y enfermer en scellant le tombeau. Leur sacrifice fut considéré comme un acte sacré, et les monstres devinrent le symbole de la planète elle-même et de ses richesses.

Le temple découvert par {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} au cœur du système radiculaire de Zarkov devint la malédiction secrète de la planète. La barrière retenant les Chasseurs à l'intérieur devait être renforcée à quelques années d'intervalle avec un nouvel apport de pouvoirs psychiques. Au fil du temps, cette pratique devint un rite sacré consistant à sacrifier l'un des psykers de la planète à la barrière et aux Chasseurs. Les monstres, quant à eux, finirent par symboliser la planète elle-même et ses richesses.

languages.text: El templo hallado por {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente entre las raíces más profundas de Zarkov se convirtió en la maldición secreta del planeta. Se desterraron psíquicos a sus entrañas para atraer a los Pastores y atraparlos en su interior tras sellar la tumba. Aquel sacrificio se consideró un martirio sagrado, y los monstruos se tomaron como un símbolo del propio planeta y de sus riquezas.
languages.original_text: The temple found by the Rogue Trader deep within Zarkov's root system became the planet's secret curse. Psykers were banished to its depths to lure the Drovers there and trap them inside, sealing off the tomb. This sacrifice was considered sacred, and the monsters became a symbol of the planet itself and its riches.

Se desterraron psíquicos a sus entrañas para atraer a los Pastores y atraparlos en su interior tras sellar la tumba. Aquel sacrificio se consideró un martirio sagrado, y los monstruos se tomaron como un símbolo del propio planeta y de sus riquezas.

languages.text: Hür Tacir'in Zarkov'un kök sisteminin derinliklerinde bulduğu tapınak, gezegenin gizli laneti oldu. Ruhsezerler, Çobanları oraya çekmek ve onları içeride tuzağa düşürerek mezarı mühürlemek için derinliklerine sürgün edildi. Bu fedakârlık kutsal kabul edildi ve yaratıklar, gezegenin kendisinin ve zenginliklerinin sembolü hâline geldi.
languages.original_text: The temple found by the Rogue Trader deep within Zarkov's root system became the planet's secret curse. Psykers were banished to its depths to lure the Drovers there and trap them inside, sealing off the tomb. This sacrifice was considered sacred, and the monsters became a symbol of the planet itself and its riches.

traits.locale_text: Hür Tacir'in Zarkov'un kök sisteminin derinliklerinde bulduğu tapınak, gezegenin gizli laneti oldu. Ruhsezerler, Çobanları oraya çekmek ve onları içeride tuzağa düşürerek mezarı mühürlemek için derinliklerine sürgün edildi. Bu fedakârlık kutsal kabul edildi ve yaratıklar, gezegenin kendisinin ve zenginliklerinin sembolü hâline geldi.

languages.text: Der {mf|vom Freihändler|von der Freihändlerin} im Wurzelsystem von Zarkov gefundene Tempel wurde zum heimlichen Fluch des Planeten. Psioniker wurden in seine Tiefen verbannt, um die Treiber in die Gruft zu locken und diese zu versiegeln. Dieses Opfer galt als heilig und die Monster wurden ein Symbol des Planeten selbst und seiner Reichtümer.
